## Summary

- Describe what this change does.
- Link relevant issue(s) if available.
- Call out affected layers: UI, Redux state, tests, CI, docs, or deployment.

## AI Assistance

- [ ] AI assistance was used for part of this change.
- If yes, briefly note what the AI produced and what you verified or edited manually.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` (if browser behavior changed)
- [ ] `npm run build`

Reference: `TESTING.md` and `CONTRIBUTING.md`

## Notes

- Deployment or rollback considerations:
- Follow-up tasks:
